findings.label: Phillip Properties petroleum/convenience-store executive
findings.notes: Joe Phillips (Mission/McAllen TX) led his family's petroleum business Phillip Properties Inc as President/CEO 1985-1999, building a regional chain of convenience stores and truck stops; subsequently President of Tex-Best Travel Centers (Phillips 66-branded fuel stops) headquartered in McAllen.

evidence.evidence_text: LittleSis bio for Joseph F Phillips (Mission, TX)
evidence.snippet: joined his families petroleum business, Phillip Properties, Inc. ... served as President/CEO from 1985-1999 ... helped build it into a regional chain of convenience stores, truck stops, and Burger King restaurants.
evidence.search_query: "Joseph Phillips" Mission Texas business owner physician
evidence.rule: name+city match; named executive of petroleum business

evidence.evidence_text: Tex-Best Travel Centers company profile (McAllen, TX) lists Joseph F Phillips as President
evidence.snippet: Joseph F Phillips is the President at Tex-Best Travel Centers ... located at 1308 S Ware Road, McAllen, TX 78501. The company operates under the Phillips 66 brand and is categorized in industries including ... gasoline stations.
evidence.search_query: "Joseph Phillips" "Phillip Properties" McAllen petroleum convenience stores
